creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
I found some warnings like..

'++crc+crypto' is not a recognized feature for this target (ignoring feature)
'++crc+crypto' is not a recognized feature for this target (ignoring feature)
'++crc' is not a recognized feature for this target (ignoring feature)
'++crc' is not a recognized feature for this target (ignoring feature)
'++crypto' is not a recognized feature for this target (ignoring feature)
'++crypto' is not a recognized feature for this target (ignoring feature)

Which should be fixed with the latest version of the patch - I am not sure if they are a problem or not.

Still not sure how to apply the -march though.
